message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9FF
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #666666
}

box "BL1 common code" #E6E6E6
participant "bl1_main" as bl1_main
participant "bl_common" as bl_common
end box

box "arm platform code" #BFE7F2
participant "fvp_bl1_setup" as fvp_bl1_setup
participant "arm_bl1_setup" as arm_bl1_setup
participant "arm_io_storage" as arm_io_storage
end box

box "platform common code" #E6E6E6
participant "plat_bl1_common" as plat_bl1_common
participant "fconf" as fconf
end box

bl1_main -> fvp_bl1_setup : bl1_platform_setup()
fvp_bl1_setup -> arm_bl1_setup : arm_bl1_platform_setup()
arm_bl1_setup -> arm_io_storage : plat_arm_io_setup()
note right of arm_io_storage
register and setup fip
end note

arm_bl1_setup -> fconf : fconf_load_config()
note right of fconf
create and populate an\nimage_desc_t for FW_CONFIG
end note

bl_common -> fconf : load_auth_image(FW_CONFIG_ID, &image_info)
note left of bl_common
load and auth image from fip\nwith info from plat_io_policy
end note

arm_io_storage -> fconf : FCONF_GET_PROPERTY(arm, arm_io_policies, tb_fw_cfg)
note right of fconf
use staticaly defined policies in bl1
end note

arm_io_storage -> fconf : image_info
note right of fconf
get tb_fw_config_dtb from image_info
end note

fconf -> plat_bl1_common : bl1_plat_get_image_desc(BL2_IMAGE_ID)
plat_bl1_common -> fconf : BL2_IMAGE_DESC
note right of fconf
set ep_info.args.arg0 of BL2_IMAGE_DESC\nto FW_CONFIG base address
end note

== load & auth, prepare and jump to BL2 ==

@enduml
```
